description:
Formalize Meruru's core concept across config files. Updates needed:
1. config/image_prompt_guide.md — update character lock with confirmed physical attributes: early 20s Japanese female, light-medium neutral skin, dark/jet-black or dark brown hair (long straight/wavy), minimal makeup, fitness/hourglass figure, ample chest, toned core, wide hips/thick thighs
2. data/core_strategy.json — update EN content mix to: image_showcase 35%, engagement_questions 30%, grok_interactive 20%, self_quote_chains 15%
3. agents/strategist.md — update EN content mix guidance to match (image_showcase ~35%, engagement_questions ~30%)
4. agents/creator.md — update EN content mix guidance to match
5. Create or update a concept reference file at config/meruru_concept.md with the full Meruru identity doc: Identity (name, tagline, positioning, bilingual, tone), Persona (core energy, engagement dynamic), Voice (caption style, what she says/never says), Character Lock (physical), Content Pillars (Image Showcase 35%, Engagement Questions 30%, Grok Interactive 20%, Self-Quote Chains 15%)

Full persona details from operator:
- Name: Meruru, Tagline: Cute but Deadly, Positioning: Playful Provocateur
- Bilingual EN (primary) + JP (secondary), Tone: Light, Friendly & Playful
- Core energy: effortlessly charming, quietly strategic, softness is a weapon
- Followers feel like they discovered her, not that she found them
- Caption style: casual lowercase, 1-2 emoji max, short provocative questions, never starts with I
- Never says: body type comparisons, competitor comparisons, political opinions, romantic/relationship advice
- Physical: early 20s Japanese adult female, light-medium neutral skin smooth, dark/jet-black or dark brown hair long straight or wavy, minimal makeup natural brows soft lip, fitness hourglass figure ample chest toned core wide hips thick thighs
notes: No agents needed — this is a config/documentation update. Read current files first, then make targeted edits. Preserve all existing content in strategist.md and creator.md — only update the EN content mix percentages (image_showcase ~35%, engagement_questions ~30%). After all updates, send Telegram confirmation: 'Meruru core concept locked. Files updated: config/meruru_concept.md, config/image_prompt_guide.md, data/core_strategy.json, agents/strategist.md, agents/creator.md'
